name: autoresearch
description: Auto Research for OpenCode. Run a structured autonomous iteration loop with a standing subagent pool.

interface.shortDescription: Subagent-first autonomous iteration loop for OpenCode
interface.longDescription: Run a structured improve-verify loop using a standing subagent pool, mode-specific workflows, and mechanical verification. Activate with /autoresearch or specialized modes like /autoresearch:plan, /autoresearch:debug, /autoresearch:fix, /autoresearch:learn, /autoresearch:predict, /autoresearch:scenario, /autoresearch:security, /autoresearch:ship.
